card_description: Eric Lampton (meaning "Lampton = lamp town") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Rock musician and filmmaker who channels VALIS through the movie Valis. Name note: Town of lamps — illumination. Art as vessel for divine information — the artist as unconscious prophet. First appears in *VALIS*.

reference.brief: Rock musician and filmmaker who channels VALIS through the movie Valis
reference.significance: Art as vessel for divine information — the artist as unconscious prophet
